# jamfschool_user (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jamf School user by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jamfschool_user" "example" {
  id = 123
}

output "user_email" {
  value = data.jamfschool_user.example.email
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Unique identifier of the user.

### Read-Only

- `device_count` (Number) Number of devices.
- `email` (String) Email address.
- `exclude` (Boolean) Don't apply Teacher restrictions.
- `first_name` (String) First name.
- `group_names` (List of String) Names of groups the user is a member of, in the same order as member_of.
- `last_name` (String) Last name.
- `location_id` (Number) Location ID.
- `member_of` (Set of Number) Set of group IDs the user is a member of.
- `notes` (String) Notes.
- `status` (String) User status.
- `username` (String) Username.
